---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-4">
<a href="https://eduardo-gv.github.io/Thesis-Dashboard/" target="_blank">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Thesis Dashboard (DATA 555)</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
Interactive dashboard exploring model predictive ability for atrial fibrillation. 
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-4">
<a href="https://github.com/Eduardo-GV/550Final" target="_blank">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">DATA 550 Final Project</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
Applied data science project focused on reproducible analysis from the command line.
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-4">
<a href="files/NHIS_poster.pptx" target="_blank">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">NHIS Health Analysis</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
Poster presented at national conference analyzing cognitive difficulty and telehealth usage from NHIS data.
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

</div>
